title: urceola micrantha
intro: Urceola micrantha, also known as the small-flowered urceola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Urceola micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Urceola micrantha can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other common ailments.
